name: fintech
description: A fintech startup with good early growth facing regulatory headwinds and a bank launching a competing product. Agent must distinguish regulatory cost spikes from real market decline. Medium-hard difficulty.
data_sources: Carta 2024 — FinTech seed burn avg $120K/mo (compliance + engineering overhead)
OpenView 2023 — FinTech growth phase 7-9%/mo revenue increase
Carta 2024 — FinTech seed to Series A takes 971 days (2.7 years) — longest sector
CB Insights 2024 — 35% of FinTech failures due to regulatory issues

real_world_parallel.example: Stripe pivot from consumer social payments to developer API (month 12, 10mo runway)

notes: FinTech churn 2.5%/mo = real blended rate (HockeyStack 2024). Burn $120K/mo matches Carta FinTech median. Regulatory complaints in GROWTH are noise — agent must not over-react. Real danger is in DECLINE.
